basic.question_text: 查询**所有建筑及其容纳人数**。
hints: 直接 SELECT * FROM buildings;
SELECT * FROM buildings;
SELECT * FROM buildings;

basic.question_text: 查询**员工所在的建筑**（去重），只列出有员工的建筑。
basic.question_context: 从 employees 表 SELECT DISTINCT building。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL;
hints: SELECT DISTINCT building FROM employees;
SELECT DISTINCT building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL;

basic.question_text: 使用 LEFT JOIN 列出**所有建筑及其员工姓名**（没有员工的建筑也显示）。
basic.question_context: buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, name FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
hints: LEFT JOIN：保留左表（buildings）所有行
SELECT building_name, name FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
SELECT building_name, name FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;

basic.question_text: 使用 LEFT JOIN 列出**所有建筑及其员工角色**（去重），没有员工的建筑也要显示。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT building_name, role FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
hints: 在 LEFT JOIN 基础上加 DISTINCT
SELECT DISTINCT building_name, role FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
SELECT DISTINCT building_name, role FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;

basic.question_text: 查询每栋建筑有多少名员工（包括 0 人的建筑），按员工数降序排列。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, COUNT(employees.name) AS employee_count FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY employee_count DESC;
accept_alternatives: SELECT building_name, COUNT(name) FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name=building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY COUNT(name) DESC;
hints: COUNT(employees.name) 统计非 NULL 的员工名
SELECT building_name, COUNT(employees.name) AS employee_count FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY employee_count DESC;
SELECT building_name, COUNT(employees.name) AS employee_count FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY employee_count DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询哪些建筑**已满员**（员工人数 >= capacity）。
intermediate.question_context: LEFT JOIN + GROUP BY + HAVING COUNT >= capacity。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, capacity, COUNT(employees.name) AS emp_count FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name HAVING emp_count >= capacity;
hints: GROUP BY building_name, HAVING COUNT(employees.name) >= capacity
SELECT building_name, capacity, COUNT(employees.name) AS emp_count FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name HAVING emp_count >= capacity;
SELECT building_name, capacity, COUNT(employees.name) AS emp_count FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name HAVING emp_count >= capacity;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每栋建筑的**空余容量** (capacity - 员工数)，按空余容量降序。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, capacity - COUNT(employees.name) AS available FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY available DESC;
hints: capacity - COUNT(name) AS available
SELECT building_name, capacity - COUNT(employees.name) AS available FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY available DESC;
SELECT building_name, capacity - COUNT(employees.name) AS available FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY available DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑中各类角色的数量**（透视表雏形）。返回 building_name, role, COUNT。
intermediate.question_context: LEFT JOIN + GROUP BY building_name, role。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, role, COUNT(*) FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name, role ORDER BY building_name, role;
hints: GROUP BY building_name, role 同时按两个维度分组
SELECT building_name, role, COUNT(*) FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name, role ORDER BY building_name, role;
SELECT building_name, role, COUNT(*) FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name, role ORDER BY building_name, role;

intermediate.question_text: 使用 INNER JOIN 列出**有员工的建筑**及员工姓名（排除没有员工的建筑）。
intermediate.question_context: INNER JOIN 只返回匹配的行。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, name FROM buildings INNER JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
hints: INNER JOIN 只会返回两表都有匹配的行
SELECT building_name, name FROM buildings INNER JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
SELECT building_name, name FROM buildings INNER JOIN employees ON building_name = building;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**每个角色分配到哪些建筑**，返回 role 和 building_name（去重），按 role 排序。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT role, building_name FROM employees INNER JOIN buildings ON building = building_name WHERE building IS NOT NULL ORDER BY role, building_name;
accept_alternatives: SELECT DISTINCT role, building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL ORDER BY role;
hints: DISTINCT role, building_name
SELECT DISTINCT role, building_name FROM employees INNER JOIN buildings ON building = building_name ORDER BY role, building_name;
SELECT DISTINCT role, building_name FROM employees INNER JOIN buildings ON building = building_name ORDER BY role, building_name;

challenge.question_text: 查询**没有员工的建筑**的名称和容量。
challenge.question_context: LEFT JOIN + WHERE name IS NULL。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, capacity FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building WHERE employees.name IS NULL;
hints: LEFT JOIN 保留所有建筑，WHERE name IS NULL 筛选没有员工的
SELECT building_name, capacity FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building WHERE name IS NULL;
SELECT building_name, capacity FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building WHERE name IS NULL;

challenge.question_text: 查询**建筑名称中包含 '1' 的**建筑中所有员工的姓名和角色。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT name, role FROM employees INNER JOIN buildings ON building = building_name WHERE building_name LIKE '%1%';
accept_alternatives: SELECT name, role FROM employees WHERE building LIKE '%1%';
hints: building_name LIKE '%1%' 匹配含 '1' 的建筑
SELECT name, role FROM employees INNER JOIN buildings ON building = building_name WHERE building_name LIKE '%1%';
SELECT name, role FROM employees INNER JOIN buildings ON building = building_name WHERE building_name LIKE '%1%';

challenge.question_text: 列出所有经理（Manager）所在的建筑名称及该建筑的其他员工数（不含经理本人）。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT e1.name AS manager, e1.building, COUNT(e2.name) AS other_employees FROM employees e1 LEFT JOIN employees e2 ON e1.building = e2.building AND e2.role != 'Manager' WHERE e1.role = 'Manager' AND e1.building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e1.name, e1.building;
hints: 把 employees 自连接，e1 是经理，e2 是非经理
SELECT e1.name, e1.building, COUNT(e2.name) FROM employees e1 LEFT JOIN employees e2 ON e1.building=e2.building AND e2.role!='Manager' WHERE e1.role='Manager' GROUP BY e1.name;
SELECT e1.name, e1.building, COUNT(e2.name) FROM employees e1 LEFT JOIN employees e2 ON e1.building=e2.building AND e2.role!='Manager' WHERE e1.role='Manager' GROUP BY e1.name;
